title: Swiss Design Portfolio
seoTitle: Swiss Design Portfolio - Downloadable Premium Portfolio Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: A Swiss-style portfolio with disciplined grids, typographic clarity, and a high-signal visual system for modern design work.
summary: A Swiss-style portfolio with disciplined grids, typographic clarity, and a high-signal visual system for modern design work.
description: This template focuses on ordered layout, sharp typography, and restrained presentation, making it ideal for designers who want a rational, gallery-quality portfolio experience.
audience: graphic designers, art directors, and modern creative portfolios
prompt: Design a premium Swiss-inspired portfolio with rigid grids, typographic precision, editorial spacing, and a clean modernist visual system.
layoutNotes: Grids and type do the work, so extra decorative UI should stay minimal.
This template is ideal when the creator wants precision and clarity over visual noise.
responsiveNotes: The strict grid system simplifies into aligned stacked sections on smaller screens.
Spacing and text hierarchy remain the main identity even in mobile layouts.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Swiss Design — Portfolio</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* ============================================
           SWISS DESIGN — CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES
           ============================================ */
        :root {
            --red: #FF0000;
            --black: #000000;
            --white: #FFFFFF;
            --gray-100: #F5F5F5;
            --gray-200: #E5E5E5;
            --gray-300: #D4D4D4;
            --gray-400: #A3A3A3;
            --gray-500: #737373;
            --gray-600: #525252;
            --gray-700: #404040;
            --gray-800: #262626;
            --gray-900: #171717;

            --font-body: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            --font-display: 'Oswald', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;

            --grid-columns: 12;
            --grid-gap: 24px;
            --grid-margin: 80px;

            --fs-hero: clamp(4rem, 12vw, 11rem);
            --fs-section: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
            --fs-sub: clamp(1.125rem, 2vw, 1.5rem);
            --fs-body: 1rem;
            --fs-small: 0.875rem;
            --fs-caption: 0.75rem;

            --lh-tight: 0.9;
            --lh-normal: 1.5;
            --lh-loose: 1.7;

            --rule: 2px solid var(--black);
            --rule-red: 2px solid var(--red);

            --transition: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1);
        }

        /* ============================================
           RESET & BASE
           ============================================ */
        *, *::before, *::after {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: var(--fs-body);
            line-height: var(--lh-normal);
            color: var(--black);
            background: var(--white);
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        ::selection {
            background: var(--red);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        a {
            color: inherit;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        img {
            display: block;
            max-width: 100%;
        }

        ul, ol {
            list-style: none;
        }

        /* ============================================
           UTILITY
           ============================================ */
        .container {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 var(--grid-margin);
        }

        .rule-top {
            border-top: var(--rule);
        }

        .rule-bottom {
            border-bottom: var(--rule);
        }

        .red { color: var(--red); }
        .bg-black { background: var(--black); color: var(--white); }
        .bg-red { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); }

        .display {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            line-height: var(--lh-tight);
        }

        .section-label {
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .section-label::before {
            content: '';
            display: inline-block;
            width: 24px;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
        }

        /* ============================================
           NAVIGATION
           ============================================ */
        .nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            z-index: 1000;
            background: var(--white);
            border-bottom: var(--rule);
            transition: transform var(--transition);
        }

        .nav.hidden {
            transform: translateY(-100%);
        }

        .nav-inner {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            height: 64px;
        }

        .nav-logo {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        }

        .nav-logo span {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 32px;
        }

        .nav-links a {
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            font-weight: 500;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            position: relative;
            transition: color var(--transition);
        }

        .nav-links a:hover {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .nav-links a::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -4px;
            left: 0;
            width: 0;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
            transition: width var(--transition);
        }

        .nav-links a:hover::after {
            width: 100%;
        }

        .nav-menu-btn {
            display: none;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            width: 32px;
            height: 24px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .nav-menu-btn span {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--black);
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .nav-menu-btn span:nth-child(1) { top: 0; }
        .nav-menu-btn span:nth-child(2) { top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); }
        .nav-menu-btn span:nth-child(3) { bottom: 0; }

        .nav-menu-btn.active span:nth-child(1) { top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg); }
        .nav-menu-btn.active span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; }
        .nav-menu-btn.active span:nth-child(3) { bottom: 50%; transform: translateY(50%) rotate(-45deg); }

        /* ============================================
           HERO
           ============================================ */
        .hero {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            position: relative;
            padding-top: 64px;
        }

        .hero-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 80px 0 80px 0;
        }

        .hero-title {
            font-size: var(--fs-hero);
            line-height: var(--lh-tight);
            letter-spacing: -0.04em;
        }

        .hero-title .line {
            display: block;
        }

        .hero-title .line-accent {
            color: var(--red);
            -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--red);
            color: transparent;
        }

        .hero-meta {
            margin-top: 48px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 24px;
            border-top: var(--rule);
            padding-top: 24px;
        }

        .hero-meta-item label {
            display: block;
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }

        .hero-meta-item span {
            font-size: var(--fs-sub);
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .hero-visual {
            background: var(--gray-100);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-left: var(--rule);
        }

        .hero-visual-inner {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .geo-circle {
            width: 55%;
            aspect-ratio: 1;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 2px solid var(--black);
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .geo-circle::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 15%;
            left: 15%;
            width: 70%;
            height: 70%;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--red);
            opacity: 0.15;
        }

        .geo-circle::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 30%;
            left: 30%;
            width: 40%;
            height: 40%;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--red);
        }

        .hero-year {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 40px;
            right: 40px;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(6rem, 10vw, 10rem);
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1;
            color: var(--gray-200);
            z-index: 0;
        }

        .hero-scroll {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 40px;
            left: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
        }

        .hero-scroll-line {
            width: 48px;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
            animation: scrollPulse 2s ease infinite;
        }

        @keyframes scrollPulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: scaleX(1); }
            50% { transform: scaleX(0.5); }
        }

        /* ============================================
           PROJECTS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .projects {
            padding: 120px 0;
        }

        .projects-header {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
            gap: 40px;
            align-items: end;
            margin-bottom: 64px;
        }

        .projects-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .projects-count {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            justify-self: end;
            align-self: end;
            padding-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .projects-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
        }

        .project-card {
            border: var(--rule);
            margin: -1px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .project-card:hover {
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .project-card:hover .project-img {
            transform: scale(1.03);
        }

        .project-card:hover .project-overlay {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .project-img-wrap {
            aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            background: var(--gray-100);
        }

        .project-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform 600ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1);
        }

        .project-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.9);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity var(--transition);
        }

        .project-overlay span {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .project-info {
            padding: 20px 24px;
            border-top: var(--rule);
        }

        .project-info h3 {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }

        .project-tags {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-top: 8px;
        }

        .project-tags span {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
        }

        .project-tags span + span::before {
            content: '/';
            margin-right: 12px;
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .project-number {
            position: absolute;
            top: 16px;
            left: 16px;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--white);
            background: var(--black);
            padding: 4px 10px;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        /* ============================================
           ABOUT SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .about {
            padding: 120px 0;
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .about-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 5fr 7fr;
            gap: 80px;
        }

        .about-left {
            position: relative;
        }

        .about-portrait {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 3 / 4;
            background: var(--gray-800);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .about-portrait::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border: 2px solid var(--red);
            transform: translate(16px, 16px);
        }

        .about-portrait-placeholder {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 4rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--gray-700);
        }

        .about-right {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .about-right h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }

        .about-right h2 span {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .about-text {
            font-size: var(--fs-sub);
            line-height: var(--lh-loose);
            color: var(--gray-400);
            max-width: 560px;
        }

        .about-text p + p {
            margin-top: 24px;
        }

        .about-stats {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
            margin-top: 48px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
        }

        .about-stat {
            padding: 24px 0;
            border-right: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
        }

        .about-stat:last-child {
            border-right: none;
        }

        .about-stat .number {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--red);
            line-height: 1;
        }

        .about-stat .label {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            margin-top: 8px;
        }

        /* ============================================
           SKILLS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .skills {
            padding: 120px 0;
        }

        .skills-header {
            margin-bottom: 64px;
        }

        .skills-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .skills-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 80px;
        }

        .skill-chart {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 28px;
        }

        .skill-item {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 180px 1fr auto;
            gap: 16px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .skill-name {
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
        }

        .skill-bar-track {
            height: 8px;
            background: var(--gray-200);
            position: relative;
        }

        .skill-bar-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: var(--red);
            transition: width 1s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1);
            width: 0;
        }

        .skill-bar-fill.animated {
            /* width set by data attribute */
        }

        .skill-percent {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            font-weight: 600;
            min-width: 40px;
            text-align: right;
        }

        .skills-tools {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
        }

        .skill-tool {
            padding: 20px 24px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            font-weight: 500;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .skill-tool:hover {
            background: var(--red);
            color: var(--white);
            border-color: var(--red);
        }

        /* ============================================
           PROCESS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .process {
            padding: 120px 0;
            background: var(--gray-100);
        }

        .process-header {
            margin-bottom: 64px;
        }

        .process-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .process-steps {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
        }

        .process-step {
            padding: 40px 32px;
            border: var(--rule);
            margin: -1px;
            position: relative;
            transition: background var(--transition);
        }

        .process-step:hover {
            background: var(--white);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .process-step:hover .step-number {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .step-number {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1;
            color: var(--gray-300);
            transition: color var(--transition);
        }

        .step-title {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            margin-top: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .step-desc {
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            color: var(--gray-600);
            line-height: var(--lh-loose);
        }

        .step-line {
            width: 32px;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
            margin-top: 20px;
        }

        /* ============================================
           CLIENTS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .clients {
            padding: 120px 0;
        }

        .clients-header {
            margin-bottom: 64px;
        }

        .clients-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .clients-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
        }

        .client-item {
            aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--gray-400);
            transition: all var(--transition);
            margin: -1px;
        }

        .client-item:hover {
            color: var(--black);
            border-color: var(--red);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        /* ============================================
           AWARDS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .awards {
            padding: 120px 0;
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .awards-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: end;
            margin-bottom: 48px;
            padding-bottom: 24px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
        }

        .awards-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .awards-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .award-item {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr 200px 120px;
            gap: 24px;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 28px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .award-item:hover {
            padding-left: 16px;
            border-color: var(--red);
        }

        .award-year {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .award-name {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.125rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        }

        .award-org {
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            color: var(--gray-500);
        }

        .award-category {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            text-align: right;
        }

        /* ============================================
           CONTACT SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .contact {
            padding: 120px 0;
        }

        .contact-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 5fr 7fr;
            gap: 80px;
        }

        .contact-left h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .contact-left h2 span {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .contact-left p {
            margin-top: 24px;
            font-size: var(--fs-sub);
            color: var(--gray-600);
            line-height: var(--lh-loose);
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        .contact-details {
            margin-top: 48px;
            border-top: var(--rule);
            padding-top: 24px;
        }

        .contact-detail {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
            padding: 12px 0;
        }

        .contact-detail .label {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            min-width: 80px;
        }

        .contact-detail .value {
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .contact-form {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0;
        }

        .form-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 0;
        }

        .form-group {
            position: relative;
        }

        .form-group input,
        .form-group textarea {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 20px 24px;
            border: none;
            border-bottom: var(--rule);
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: var(--fs-body);
            background: transparent;
            outline: none;
            transition: border-color var(--transition);
        }

        .form-group input:focus,
        .form-group textarea:focus {
            border-color: var(--red);
        }

        .form-group input + .form-group input {
            border-left: var(--rule);
        }

        .form-group textarea {
            resize: vertical;
            min-height: 160px;
        }

        .form-group input::placeholder,
        .form-group textarea::placeholder {
            color: var(--gray-400);
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .form-submit {
            margin-top: 32px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .form-submit .note {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            color: var(--gray-500);
        }

        .btn-submit {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            background: var(--red);
            color: var(--white);
            border: none;
            padding: 16px 48px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition);
            position: relative;
        }

        .btn-submit:hover {
            background: var(--black);
            padding: 16px 64px;
        }

        /* ============================================
           FOOTER
           ============================================ */
        .footer {
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .footer-top {
            padding: 64px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
        }

        .footer-top-inner {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .footer-tagline {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            line-height: 1.1;
        }

        .footer-tagline span {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .footer-back-top {
            width: 56px;
            height: 56px;
            border: 2px solid var(--gray-700);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .footer-back-top:hover {
            border-color: var(--red);
            background: var(--red);
        }

        .footer-bottom {
            padding: 32px 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .footer-copy {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            color: var(--gray-500);
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        }

        .footer-copy .red-line {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 24px;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
            vertical-align: middle;
            margin: 0 8px;
        }

        .footer-socials {
            display: flex;
            gap: 24px;
        }

        .footer-socials a {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            transition: color var(--transition);
        }

        .footer-socials a:hover {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        /* ============================================
           RESPONSIVE
           ============================================ */
        @media (max-width: 1100px) {
            :root {
                --grid-margin: 48px;
            }

            .hero {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .hero-visual {
                min-height: 400px;
                border-left: none;
                border-top: var(--rule);
            }

            .projects-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }

            .about-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 48px;
            }

            .skills-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 48px;
            }

            .process-steps {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }

            .clients-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            }

            .award-item {
                grid-template-columns: 60px 1fr 120px;
            }

            .award-category {
                display: none;
            }

            .contact-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 48px;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            :root {
                --grid-margin: 24px;
            }

            .nav-links {
                display: none;
                position: absolute;
                top: 64px;
                left: 0;
                width: 100%;
                background: var(--white);
                border-bottom: var(--rule);
                flex-direction: column;
                padding: 24px;
                gap: 16px;
            }

            .nav-links.open {
                display: flex;
            }

            .nav-menu-btn {
                display: block;
            }

            .hero-content {
                padding: 60px 0;
            }

            .hero-meta {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .projects-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .process-steps {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .clients-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            }

            .about-stats {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            }

            .skill-item {
                grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr auto;
                gap: 8px;
            }

            .skills-tools {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .form-row {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .form-submit {

            }

            .footer-top-inner {

                gap: 24px;
            }

            .footer-bottom {

                gap: 16px;
                text-align: center;
            }

            .award-item {

            }

            .award-org {

            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {

                gap: 0;

                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 4px;
            }

            .skill-name {

            }
        }

                <a href="#">Instagram</a>
                <a href="#">Behance</a>
                <a href="#">LinkedIn</a>
                <a href="#">Twitter</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <!-- ========== JAVASCRIPT ========== -->
    <script>
        // ---- Mobile Menu Toggle ----
        const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menuBtn');
        const navLinks = document.getElementById('navLinks');

        menuBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            menuBtn.classList.toggle('active');
            navLinks.classList.toggle('open');
        });

        navLinks.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                menuBtn.classList.remove('active');
                navLinks.classList.remove('open');
            });
        });

        // ---- Nav hide/show on scroll ----
        let lastScroll = 0;
        const nav = document.getElementById('nav');

        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            const current = window.pageYOffset;
            if (current > 80) {
                if (current > lastScroll) {
                    nav.classList.add('hidden');
                } else {
                    nav.classList.remove('hidden');
                }
            } else {
                nav.classList.remove('hidden');
            }
            lastScroll = current;
        });

        // ---- Skill bar animation ----
        const skillBars = document.querySelectorAll('.skill-bar-fill');
        const skillObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    const bar = entry.target;
                    bar.style.width = bar.getAttribute('data-width');
                    bar.classList.add('animated');
                    skillObserver.unobserve(bar);
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.3 });

        skillBars.forEach(bar => skillObserver.observe(bar));

        // ---- Scroll reveal for sections ----
        const revealSections = document.querySelectorAll(
            '.projects, .about, .skills, .process, .clients, .awards, .contact'
        );

        const sectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                    entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
                    sectionObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.05 });

        revealSections.forEach(section => {
            section.style.opacity = '0';
            section.style.transform = 'translateY(40px)';
            section.style.transition = 'opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease';
            sectionObserver.observe(section);
        });

        // ---- Process step hover enhancement ----
        document.querySelectorAll('.process-step').forEach(step => {
            step.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                step.style.transition = 'background 300ms ease';
            });
        });

        // ---- Award item hover indent ----
        document.querySelectorAll('.award-item').forEach(item => {
            item.style.transition = 'padding-left 300ms ease, border-color 300ms ease';
        });

        // ---- Smooth scroll for anchor links ----
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
                if (target) {
                    const offset = 80;
                    const top = target.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - offset;
                    window.scrollTo({ top, behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            });
        });

        // ---- Contact form handler ----
        function handleSubmit(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const btn = e.target.querySelector('.btn-submit');
            const orig = btn.textContent;
            btn.textContent = 'Sent!';
            btn.style.background = '#000';
            setTimeout(() => {
                btn.textContent = orig;
                btn.style.background = '';
                e.target.reset();
            }, 2500);
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Swiss Design — Portfolio</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* ============================================
           SWISS DESIGN — CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES
           ============================================ */
        :root {
            --red: #FF0000;
            --black: #000000;
            --white: #FFFFFF;
            --gray-100: #F5F5F5;
            --gray-200: #E5E5E5;
            --gray-300: #D4D4D4;
            --gray-400: #A3A3A3;
            --gray-500: #737373;
            --gray-600: #525252;
            --gray-700: #404040;
            --gray-800: #262626;
            --gray-900: #171717;

            --font-body: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            --font-display: 'Oswald', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;

            --grid-columns: 12;
            --grid-gap: 24px;
            --grid-margin: 80px;

            --fs-hero: clamp(4rem, 12vw, 11rem);
            --fs-section: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
            --fs-sub: clamp(1.125rem, 2vw, 1.5rem);
            --fs-body: 1rem;
            --fs-small: 0.875rem;
            --fs-caption: 0.75rem;

            --lh-tight: 0.9;
            --lh-normal: 1.5;
            --lh-loose: 1.7;

            --rule: 2px solid var(--black);
            --rule-red: 2px solid var(--red);

            --transition: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1);
        }

        /* ============================================
           RESET & BASE
           ============================================ */
        *, *::before, *::after {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: var(--fs-body);
            line-height: var(--lh-normal);
            color: var(--black);
            background: var(--white);
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        ::selection {
            background: var(--red);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        a {
            color: inherit;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        img {
            display: block;
            max-width: 100%;
        }

        ul, ol {
            list-style: none;
        }

        /* ============================================
           UTILITY
           ============================================ */
        .container {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 var(--grid-margin);
        }

        .rule-top {
            border-top: var(--rule);
        }

        .rule-bottom {
            border-bottom: var(--rule);
        }

        .red { color: var(--red); }
        .bg-black { background: var(--black); color: var(--white); }
        .bg-red { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); }

        .display {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            line-height: var(--lh-tight);
        }

        .section-label {
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .section-label::before {
            content: '';
            display: inline-block;
            width: 24px;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
        }

        /* ============================================
           NAVIGATION
           ============================================ */
        .nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            z-index: 1000;
            background: var(--white);
            border-bottom: var(--rule);
            transition: transform var(--transition);
        }

        .nav.hidden {
            transform: translateY(-100%);
        }

        .nav-inner {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            height: 64px;
        }

        .nav-logo {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        }

        .nav-logo span {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 32px;
        }

        .nav-links a {
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            font-weight: 500;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            position: relative;
            transition: color var(--transition);
        }

        .nav-links a:hover {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .nav-links a::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -4px;
            left: 0;
            width: 0;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
            transition: width var(--transition);
        }

        .nav-links a:hover::after {
            width: 100%;
        }

        .nav-menu-btn {
            display: none;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            width: 32px;
            height: 24px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .nav-menu-btn span {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--black);
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .nav-menu-btn span:nth-child(1) { top: 0; }
        .nav-menu-btn span:nth-child(2) { top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); }
        .nav-menu-btn span:nth-child(3) { bottom: 0; }

        .nav-menu-btn.active span:nth-child(1) { top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg); }
        .nav-menu-btn.active span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; }
        .nav-menu-btn.active span:nth-child(3) { bottom: 50%; transform: translateY(50%) rotate(-45deg); }

        /* ============================================
           HERO
           ============================================ */
        .hero {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            position: relative;
            padding-top: 64px;
        }

        .hero-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 80px 0 80px 0;
        }

        .hero-title {
            font-size: var(--fs-hero);
            line-height: var(--lh-tight);
            letter-spacing: -0.04em;
        }

        .hero-title .line {
            display: block;
        }

        .hero-title .line-accent {
            color: var(--red);
            -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--red);
            color: transparent;
        }

        .hero-meta {
            margin-top: 48px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 24px;
            border-top: var(--rule);
            padding-top: 24px;
        }

        .hero-meta-item label {
            display: block;
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }

        .hero-meta-item span {
            font-size: var(--fs-sub);
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .hero-visual {
            background: var(--gray-100);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-left: var(--rule);
        }

        .hero-visual-inner {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .geo-circle {
            width: 55%;
            aspect-ratio: 1;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 2px solid var(--black);
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .geo-circle::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 15%;
            left: 15%;
            width: 70%;
            height: 70%;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--red);
            opacity: 0.15;
        }

        .geo-circle::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 30%;
            left: 30%;
            width: 40%;
            height: 40%;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--red);
        }

        .hero-year {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 40px;
            right: 40px;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(6rem, 10vw, 10rem);
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1;
            color: var(--gray-200);
            z-index: 0;
        }

        .hero-scroll {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 40px;
            left: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
        }

        .hero-scroll-line {
            width: 48px;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
            animation: scrollPulse 2s ease infinite;
        }

        @keyframes scrollPulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: scaleX(1); }
            50% { transform: scaleX(0.5); }
        }

        /* ============================================
           PROJECTS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .projects {
            padding: 120px 0;
        }

        .projects-header {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
            gap: 40px;
            align-items: end;
            margin-bottom: 64px;
        }

        .projects-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .projects-count {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            justify-self: end;
            align-self: end;
            padding-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .projects-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
        }

        .project-card {
            border: var(--rule);
            margin: -1px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .project-card:hover {
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .project-card:hover .project-img {
            transform: scale(1.03);
        }

        .project-card:hover .project-overlay {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .project-img-wrap {
            aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            background: var(--gray-100);
        }

        .project-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform 600ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1);
        }

        .project-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.9);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity var(--transition);
        }

        .project-overlay span {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .project-info {
            padding: 20px 24px;
            border-top: var(--rule);
        }

        .project-info h3 {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }

        .project-tags {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-top: 8px;
        }

        .project-tags span {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
        }

        .project-tags span + span::before {
            content: '/';
            margin-right: 12px;
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .project-number {
            position: absolute;
            top: 16px;
            left: 16px;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--white);
            background: var(--black);
            padding: 4px 10px;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        /* ============================================
           ABOUT SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .about {
            padding: 120px 0;
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .about-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 5fr 7fr;
            gap: 80px;
        }

        .about-left {
            position: relative;
        }

        .about-portrait {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 3 / 4;
            background: var(--gray-800);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .about-portrait::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border: 2px solid var(--red);
            transform: translate(16px, 16px);
        }

        .about-portrait-placeholder {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 4rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--gray-700);
        }

        .about-right {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .about-right h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }

        .about-right h2 span {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .about-text {
            font-size: var(--fs-sub);
            line-height: var(--lh-loose);
            color: var(--gray-400);
            max-width: 560px;
        }

        .about-text p + p {
            margin-top: 24px;
        }

        .about-stats {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
            margin-top: 48px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
        }

        .about-stat {
            padding: 24px 0;
            border-right: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
        }

        .about-stat:last-child {
            border-right: none;
        }

        .about-stat .number {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--red);
            line-height: 1;
        }

        .about-stat .label {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            margin-top: 8px;
        }

        /* ============================================
           SKILLS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .skills {
            padding: 120px 0;
        }

        .skills-header {
            margin-bottom: 64px;
        }

        .skills-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .skills-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 80px;
        }

        .skill-chart {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 28px;
        }

        .skill-item {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 180px 1fr auto;
            gap: 16px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .skill-name {
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
        }

        .skill-bar-track {
            height: 8px;
            background: var(--gray-200);
            position: relative;
        }

        .skill-bar-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: var(--red);
            transition: width 1s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1);
            width: 0;
        }

        .skill-bar-fill.animated {
            /* width set by data attribute */
        }

        .skill-percent {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            font-weight: 600;
            min-width: 40px;
            text-align: right;
        }

        .skills-tools {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
        }

        .skill-tool {
            padding: 20px 24px;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            font-weight: 500;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .skill-tool:hover {
            background: var(--red);
            color: var(--white);
            border-color: var(--red);
        }

        /* ============================================
           PROCESS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .process {
            padding: 120px 0;
            background: var(--gray-100);
        }

        .process-header {
            margin-bottom: 64px;
        }

        .process-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .process-steps {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
        }

        .process-step {
            padding: 40px 32px;
            border: var(--rule);
            margin: -1px;
            position: relative;
            transition: background var(--transition);
        }

        .process-step:hover {
            background: var(--white);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .process-step:hover .step-number {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .step-number {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1;
            color: var(--gray-300);
            transition: color var(--transition);
        }

        .step-title {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            margin-top: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .step-desc {
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            color: var(--gray-600);
            line-height: var(--lh-loose);
        }

        .step-line {
            width: 32px;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
            margin-top: 20px;
        }

        /* ============================================
           CLIENTS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .clients {
            padding: 120px 0;
        }

        .clients-header {
            margin-bottom: 64px;
        }

        .clients-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .clients-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
            gap: 0;
        }

        .client-item {
            aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--gray-400);
            transition: all var(--transition);
            margin: -1px;
        }

        .client-item:hover {
            color: var(--black);
            border-color: var(--red);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        /* ============================================
           AWARDS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .awards {
            padding: 120px 0;
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .awards-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: end;
            margin-bottom: 48px;
            padding-bottom: 24px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
        }

        .awards-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .awards-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .award-item {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr 200px 120px;
            gap: 24px;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 28px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .award-item:hover {
            padding-left: 16px;
            border-color: var(--red);
        }

        .award-year {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .award-name {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.125rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        }

        .award-org {
            font-size: var(--fs-small);
            color: var(--gray-500);
        }

        .award-category {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            text-align: right;
        }

        /* ============================================
           CONTACT SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .contact {
            padding: 120px 0;
        }

        .contact-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 5fr 7fr;
            gap: 80px;
        }

        .contact-left h2 {
            font-size: var(--fs-section);
        }

        .contact-left h2 span {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .contact-left p {
            margin-top: 24px;
            font-size: var(--fs-sub);
            color: var(--gray-600);
            line-height: var(--lh-loose);
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        .contact-details {
            margin-top: 48px;
            border-top: var(--rule);
            padding-top: 24px;
        }

        .contact-detail {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
            padding: 12px 0;
        }

        .contact-detail .label {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            min-width: 80px;
        }

        .contact-detail .value {
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .contact-form {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0;
        }

        .form-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 0;
        }

        .form-group {
            position: relative;
        }

        .form-group input,
        .form-group textarea {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 20px 24px;
            border: none;
            border-bottom: var(--rule);
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: var(--fs-body);
            background: transparent;
            outline: none;
            transition: border-color var(--transition);
        }

        .form-group input:focus,
        .form-group textarea:focus {
            border-color: var(--red);
        }

        .form-group input + .form-group input {
            border-left: var(--rule);
        }

        .form-group textarea {
            resize: vertical;
            min-height: 160px;
        }

        .form-group input::placeholder,
        .form-group textarea::placeholder {
            color: var(--gray-400);
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .form-submit {
            margin-top: 32px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .form-submit .note {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            color: var(--gray-500);
        }

        .btn-submit {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            background: var(--red);
            color: var(--white);
            border: none;
            padding: 16px 48px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition);
            position: relative;
        }

        .btn-submit:hover {
            background: var(--black);
            padding: 16px 64px;
        }

        /* ============================================
           FOOTER
           ============================================ */
        .footer {
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .footer-top {
            padding: 64px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
        }

        .footer-top-inner {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .footer-tagline {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            line-height: 1.1;
        }

        .footer-tagline span {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        .footer-back-top {
            width: 56px;
            height: 56px;
            border: 2px solid var(--gray-700);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition);
        }

        .footer-back-top:hover {
            border-color: var(--red);
            background: var(--red);
        }

        .footer-bottom {
            padding: 32px 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .footer-copy {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            color: var(--gray-500);
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        }

        .footer-copy .red-line {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 24px;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--red);
            vertical-align: middle;
            margin: 0 8px;
        }

        .footer-socials {
            display: flex;
            gap: 24px;
        }

        .footer-socials a {
            font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--gray-500);
            transition: color var(--transition);
        }

        .footer-socials a:hover {
            color: var(--red);
        }

        /* ============================================
           RESPONSIVE
           ============================================ */
        @media (max-width: 1100px) {
            :root {
                --grid-margin: 48px;
            }

            .hero {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .hero-visual {
                min-height: 400px;
                border-left: none;
                border-top: var(--rule);
            }

            .projects-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }

            .about-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 48px;
            }

            .skills-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 48px;
            }

            .process-steps {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }

            .clients-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            }

            .award-item {
                grid-template-columns: 60px 1fr 120px;
            }

            .award-category {
                display: none;
            }

            .contact-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 48px;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            :root {
                --grid-margin: 24px;
            }

            .nav-links {
                display: none;
                position: absolute;
                top: 64px;
                left: 0;
                width: 100%;
                background: var(--white);
                border-bottom: var(--rule);
                flex-direction: column;
                padding: 24px;
                gap: 16px;
            }

            .nav-links.open {
                display: flex;
            }

            .nav-menu-btn {
                display: block;
            }

            .hero-content {
                padding: 60px 0;
            }

            .hero-meta {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .projects-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .process-steps {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .clients-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            }

            .about-stats {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            }

            .skill-item {
                grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr auto;
                gap: 8px;
            }

            .skills-tools {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .form-row {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .form-submit {
                flex-direction: column;
                gap: 16px;
                align-items: flex-start;
            }

            .footer-top-inner {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 24px;
            }

            .footer-bottom {
                flex-direction: column;
                gap: 16px;
                text-align: center;
            }

            .award-item {
                grid-template-columns: 50px 1fr;
            }

            .award-org {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .clients-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }

            .about-stats {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 0;
            }

            .about-stat {
                border-right: none;
                border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
            }

            .skill-item {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 4px;
            }

            .skill-name {
                font-size: var(--fs-caption);
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

                    <span class="award-year">2021</span>
                    <span class="award-name">Swiss Design Award — Nominee</span>
                    <span class="award-org">Bak</span>
                    <span class="award-category">System</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ========== CONTACT ========== -->
    <section class="contact" id="contact">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="contact-grid">
                <div class="contact-left">
                    <span class="section-label">Get in touch</span>
                    <h2 class="display" style="margin-top: 16px;">Let's<br>build <span class="red">order</span></h2>
                    <p>Available for select projects requiring systematic design thinking. I bring clarity to complexity through structured, intentional design.</p>
                    <div class="contact-details">
                        <div class="contact-detail">
                            <span class="label">Email</span>
                            <span class="value">hello@swissdesign.ch</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-detail">
                            <span class="label">Phone</span>
                            <span class="value">+41 44 000 00 00</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-detail">
                            <span class="label">Based</span>
                            <span class="value">Zurich, Switzerland</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="contact-right">
                    <form class="contact-form" onsubmit="handleSubmit(event)">
                        <div class="form-row">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <input type="text" placeholder="Name" required>
                            </div>
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <input type="email" placeholder="Email" required>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <input type="text" placeholder="Subject">
                        </div>
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <textarea placeholder="Message" rows="6"></textarea>
                        </div>
                        <div class="form-submit">
                            <span class="note">All fields are optional except name & email</span>
                            <button type="submit" class="btn-submit">Send Message</button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ========== FOOTER ========== -->
    <footer class="footer">
        <div class="footer-top">
            <div class="container footer-top-inner">
                <div class="footer-tagline">
                    Design<br>is <span>discipline</span>
                </div>
                <div class="footer-back-top" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'})" aria-label="Back to top">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none">
                        <path d="M10 16V4M4 10l6-6 6 6" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/>
                    </svg>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="container footer-bottom">
            <span class="footer-copy">© 2025 Swiss.Design <span class="red-line"></span> All rights reserved</span>
            <div class="footer-socials">
                <a href="#">Instagram</a>
                <a href="#">Behance</a>
                <a href="#">LinkedIn</a>
                <a href="#">Twitter</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <!-- ========== JAVASCRIPT ========== -->
    <script>
        // ---- Mobile Menu Toggle ----
        const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menuBtn');
        const navLinks = document.getElementById('navLinks');

        menuBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            menuBtn.classList.toggle('active');
            navLinks.classList.toggle('open');
        });

        navLinks.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                menuBtn.classList.remove('active');
                navLinks.classList.remove('open');
            });
        });

        // ---- Nav hide/show on scroll ----
        let lastScroll = 0;
        const nav = document.getElementById('nav');

        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            const current = window.pageYOffset;
            if (current > 80) {
                if (current > lastScroll) {
                    nav.classList.add('hidden');
                } else {
                    nav.classList.remove('hidden');
                }
            } else {
                nav.classList.remove('hidden');
            }
            lastScroll = current;
        });

        // ---- Skill bar animation ----
        const skillBars = document.querySelectorAll('.skill-bar-fill');
        const skillObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    const bar = entry.target;
                    bar.style.width = bar.getAttribute('data-width');
                    bar.classList.add('animated');
                    skillObserver.unobserve(bar);
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.3 });

        skillBars.forEach(bar => skillObserver.observe(bar));

        // ---- Scroll reveal for sections ----
        const revealSections = document.querySelectorAll(
            '.projects, .about, .skills, .process, .clients, .awards, .contact'
        );

        const sectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                    entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
                    sectionObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.05 });

        revealSections.forEach(section => {
            section.style.opacity = '0';
            section.style.transform = 'translateY(40px)';
            section.style.transition = 'opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease';
            sectionObserver.observe(section);
        });

        // ---- Process step hover enhancement ----
        document.querySelectorAll('.process-step').forEach(step => {
            step.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                step.style.transition = 'background 300ms ease';
            });
        });

        // ---- Award item hover indent ----
        document.querySelectorAll('.award-item').forEach(item => {
            item.style.transition = 'padding-left 300ms ease, border-color 300ms ease';
        });

        // ---- Smooth scroll for anchor links ----
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
                if (target) {
                    const offset = 80;
                    const top = target.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - offset;
                    window.scrollTo({ top, behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            });
        });

        // ---- Contact form handler ----
        function handleSubmit(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const btn = e.target.querySelector('.btn-submit');
            const orig = btn.textContent;
            btn.textContent = 'Sent!';
            btn.style.background = '#000';
            setTimeout(() => {
                btn.textContent = orig;
                btn.style.background = '';
                e.target.reset();
            }, 2500);
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>
